watchFrames.title: Direct Kurdistan-region relevance
watchFrames.summary: Fathullah Hosseini represents Qasr-e Shirin , Sarpol-e Zahab and Gilan-e Gharb in Kermanshah province, making Kurdish domestic politics, border security, Iraq, and KRG-related rhetoric especially important to monitor.

watchFrames.title: Foreign-policy and security records
watchFrames.summary: Track official references to Iraq, KRG, Erbil, Kurdish opposition groups, border incidents, security agreements, trade crossings, sanctions, energy, and minority issues.

watchFrames.title: Faction signal
watchFrames.summary: Faction labels are a weak proxy in Iran; use them as a starting filter, not a final stance.

officialSourceNotes: The official ParlIran host was unreachable during generation, so this local profile is seeded from a public 12th-term roster and official-source search slots.

The records page keeps official Majlis, IPU, ICANA, and Majlis Research Center paths visible so analysts can replace public-list fields with official profile and vote data when the official host is reachable.
TOR Phi profile and record navigation remains internal.
